audit_items.proof_trace: Both dereferences of GetImageDecoder() are properly guarded: line 497 is inside an `if ((magick_info != NULL) && (GetImageDecoder(magick_info) != NULL))` block (L492-493), and line 555 is only reached after an early-return check at L540-541 that exits when magick_info or its decoder is NULL. The decoder field is set once at module registration and never modified, so no TOCTOU risk exists between check and use.
